content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Cut and Stick". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1514/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum number of segments that can be obtained.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: The approach is to sort the array and then try to divide each segment into k parts.

code.Python3:
import sys
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    n, k = map(int, input().split())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    a.sort()
    ans = 0
    for i in range(n):
        ans += (a[i] // k) + (a[i] % k > 0)
    print(ans)
